_title: AIA CAD Layer Guidelines 2007 — National CAD Standard (NCS) Version 5
_edition: AIA CAD Layer Guidelines 2007 (incorporated into National CAD Standard Version 5)
current_version: NCS 5.0 (2007) — successor of AIA CAD Layer Guidelines
note: Used widely across US AEC industry. National CAD Standard (NCS) is the umbrella; AIA CAD Layer Guidelines is the layer-naming component.
scope: US CAD layer naming + status codes + discipline designators.
format_example: E-POWR-NORM-MAIN-N (Electrical, Power major, Normal minor, Main modifier, New status)

key_references_in_this_folder.status-codes.json: N=New, E=Existing, D=Demo, F=Future, R=Relocated, X=NotInContract
key_references_in_this_folder.major-group-codes.json: Electrical major group set (focus); other disciplines listed but not exhaustively populated per spec scope
key_references_in_this_folder.cad-layers.json: Skills-layer abstract layout_group → AIA concrete CAD layer code mapping
